description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a two-tone finish: a dark, wood-grained top and a muted beige body. The front displays six drawers, each adorned with ornate handles and decorative floral carvings, adding an elegant touch. The legs are gently curved in a cabriole style, enhancing its traditional aesthetic. The sides are plain, while the back is constructed from darker wood panels, likely for structural support. The drawers appear spacious, suitable for storing various items, and the top surface is flat and sturdy, ideal for placing objects. The overall craftsmanship suggests a blend of both decorative and functional qualities, making it suitable for urban interiors or sheltered outdoor settings.
description: A vintage-style chest of drawers with a dark wood top, beige body, ornate handles, and decorative carvings. It features six drawers and elegant curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with ornate handles and decorative floral carvings, as well as curved legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain beige panel and the dark wood top, with one curved leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid, dark wood panel construction with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain beige panel and dark wood top.
